description: Use this API to modify the contingency analysis solution parameters. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.1. ierr = casolution_parameters_3(intgar, realar)

intgar.description: RATBAS, base case rating (1 by default).
RATCNT, contingency case rating (2 by default).
MWRATE, Convert MVA to MW for DC solution (1 by default).
VLTBAS, base case voltage limit (1 by default).
VLTCNT, contingency case voltage limit (2 by default).
SCRCAS, enable AC contingency case screening (0 by default).
INCLOS, include loss estimates in DC solution (0 by default).
ROSOLN, Enable Robust Power flow solution for non-converged cases (0 by default).
BASLOD, Base loaded machine option (0 by default).

realar.description: RATPCT, percent of loading (100 by default).
CHAGMW, flow change cutoff in MW (100 by default).
TOTGEN,Total generation dispatch limit (10000 by default).
bus angle difference across a branch (90.0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
